basicRules: fullName must be unique in the org.
status must be one of creationOptions.status.
content must contain valid Apex trigger code.
apiVersion must be a valid Salesforce API version.

minimalExample.content: trigger AccountBeforeInsertTrigger on Account (before insert) { for (Account a : Trigger.new) { if (String.isBlank(a.Description)) { a.Description = 'Created by trigger'; } } }
